Hero.title: Ship Apps & Websites at Lightning Speed
Hero.subtitle: Deploy cross-platform Mini Apps, micro-frontends, and production websites in seconds with our high-performance infrastructure.
Hero.activity_subtitle: Real-time request volume, bandwidth consumption, and build queue status

Benefits.description: Accelerating software distribution and simplifying hosting with a high-performance, developer-first platform.
Benefits.benefit_1_desc: Publish your mini apps and web projects globally in one click. Native integration with mobile and desktop shells.
Benefits.benefit_2_desc: Your static and serverless applications are cached and executed closer to your users for sub-millisecond load times.
Benefits.benefit_3_desc: Platform routing, order processing, and API gateways are written in Rust for maximum throughput and minimal overhead.
Benefits.benefit_4_desc: Access logs, application performance metrics, and system events in real-time from a unified developer dashboard.

Contact.description: Have questions about our platform? Want a custom enterprise plan? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.subject: Subject

FAQ.q1: What types of applications can I deploy on Lepos?
FAQ.a1: You can deploy cross-platform Mini Apps, micro-frontends, Single Page Applications (Vite, React, Vue), SSR websites (Next.js, Nuxt), and high-performance trading algorithms.
FAQ.q2: How does the integrated trading engine work?
FAQ.a2: Lepos includes a built-in high-performance trading engine that can be accessed via developer APIs or widgets, allowing you to add trading capabilities directly into your mini apps.
FAQ.a3: Yes. Our web hosting is serverless and backed by a global Edge CDN, featuring automated SSL certificate generation, custom domains, and zero-configuration CI/CD.
FAQ.q4: How do I monitor my applications?
FAQ.a4: You can monitor application uptime, request logs, performance metrics, and console outputs in real-time through the Developer Console dashboard.
FAQ.q5: Do you support automated custom domain SSL?
FAQ.a5: Yes. Every custom domain connected to the platform automatically receives a free, auto-renewing SSL certificate powered by Let's Encrypt.

Features.main_title: Everything You Need, In One Platform
Features.description: Build, deploy, and scale mini apps, websites, and trading strategies — all powered by a unified cloud infrastructure.
Features.f1_desc: Build and distribute mini apps directly to mobile devices and web browsers with our native SDK support.
Features.f2_desc: Deploy Next.js, Vite, and static sites with automatic HTTPS, preview deployments, and custom domains.
Features.f3_desc: Access our ultra-fast algorithmic trading kernel directly through clean developer APIs and widgets.
Features.f4_desc: Monitor deployments, app performance, user analytics, and system events in a single unified interface.
Features.f5_desc: RESTful and WebSocket APIs for programmatic control over deployments, triggers, and data pipelines.
Features.f6_desc: SOC 2 compliance, role-based access control, and end-to-end encryption for all platform operations.

Pricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
Pricing.starter_desc: Perfect for individuals and small projects getting started.
Pricing.pro_desc: For growing teams that need more power and flexibility.
Pricing.enterprise_desc: For organizations with advanced requirements and scale.

Services.description: From low-latency execution to quantitative research, explore the full range of platform services.
Services.s1_desc: Easily package, publish, and distribute mini apps across iOS, Android, and web with zero friction.
Services.s2_desc: Connect your Git repository and deploy your frontends on our global edge network in seconds.
Services.s3_desc: Leverage a low-overhead Rust engine under the hood for real-time task queuing and API routing.
Services.s4_desc: One single platform to manage application instances, domains, credentials, and performance analytics.

Testimonials.comment_minh: Lepos cut our mini app deployment time from hours to minutes. The developer experience is absolutely seamless.
Testimonials.comment_sarah: We migrated our web projects from Vercel to Lepos and saw an immediate 30% speedup in page loads globally.
Testimonials.comment_james: The integrated Rust engine is extremely fast. It handles thousands of requests per second with negligible CPU usage.
Testimonials.comment_linh: Having a unified dashboard for our mini apps, static websites, and custom API backends is a huge timesaver.
Testimonials.comment_david: The CI/CD pipeline with auto-SSL custom domains worked flawlessly on our first try. Extremely impressed.
Testimonials.comment_maria: Their enterprise security features, like role-based access control, made compliance auditing a breeze.

Footer.rights: All rights reserved. Built with Next.js, shadcn/ui, TypeScript, and Tailwind.
